faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.a1: You upload a photo of your jewelry, choose a pose template from the library, and AI generates a professional lifestyle photo in 5–15 seconds. No photographer, studio, or expensive equipment needed.
faq.a2: Any jewelry: rings, earrings, bracelets, chains, pendants, brooches. A regular phone photo is enough — the service processes the image automatically.
faq.q3: Do I need a professional camera?
faq.a3: No. The service works with regular smartphone photos. AI automatically isolates the jewelry and places it in a professional lifestyle context.
faq.a4: 5 generations free on signup — no credit card needed. Paid plans: Starter — $1/mo (20 generations), Pro — $10/mo (150 generations), Business — $25/mo (500 generations). Cancel anytime.
faq.q5: Where can I use the generated photos?
faq.a5: Photos are suitable for Instagram, Kaspi.kz, websites, online catalogs, marketplaces, and price lists. Downloaded in high resolution.

footer.tagline: AI jewelry photos for jewelry stores.

allInOne.title: Your personal AI photo studio
allInOne.description: From a regular phone photo to ready-to-publish lifestyle content. Background removal, model selection, generation — all in one service.

costSavings.title: Cut your photo costs by 90%
costSavings.description: A professional photoshoot with a model costs from $300 per session. With Luminify you get comparable results — for the price of a cup of coffee.

multiDevice.title: Create on any device
multiDevice.description: Work from your phone or computer — the interface adapts to any screen. Photograph your product on a smartphone and get results instantly.

testimonials.title: Trusted by stores across the country
testimonials.quote1: We used to spend $300+ per photoshoot. Now we create lifestyle photos right from our phone in a minute. Instagram sales went up by 40%.
testimonials.quote2: We found Luminify by accident — now it's our main content tool. Love that you can upload a photo on your phone and instantly get results.
testimonials.quote3: We updated our entire catalog in two days. No photographer, no studio. Customers say the photos look much more attractive now.

bgRemoverPage.metaTitle: Background Remover — Free AI Tool | Luminify
bgRemoverPage.metaDescription: Remove backgrounds from photos in seconds — right in your browser, no signup required. Free AI tool by Luminify.
bgRemoverPage.heroSubtitle: Upload a photo — AI will automatically remove the background in seconds. Works right in your browser, nothing to install.
bgRemoverPage.noImage: No image? Try one of these
bgRemoverPage.feat1Title: Save time with AI background removal
bgRemoverPage.feat1Desc: Automatic background removal in 5 seconds instead of 10–15 minutes of manual editing in Photoshop. Process dozens of photos in minutes.
bgRemoverPage.feat2Desc: Update your entire product catalog in a single day. No need to hire a designer — AI handles any volume.
bgRemoverPage.feat3Desc: Products on white backgrounds sell better. Professional marketplace photos increase CTR by up to 40%.
bgRemoverPage.feat4Desc: No Photoshop or graphic design knowledge needed. Upload a phone photo — get studio-quality results.
bgRemoverPage.step1Desc: Choose a photo in JPG, PNG, or WEBP format. Any phone or camera photo will work.
bgRemoverPage.step2Desc: The neural network automatically detects the object and precisely removes the background — even with complex edges and details.
bgRemoverPage.step3Desc: Download the image with a transparent background in PNG format. Ready for marketplaces, websites, or social media.
bgRemoverPage.otherToolsSub: A complete set of AI tools for content creation
bgRemoverPage.otherTool1Desc: AI places your product on a model and creates realistic lifestyle shots
bgRemoverPage.otherTool2Desc: Ready-made cards for marketplaces with backgrounds, text, and badges
bgRemoverPage.otherTool3Desc: Color correction, shadows, text, and graphics — all in one editor
bgRemoverPage.otherTool4Desc: Model library for different product categories
bgRemoverPage.otherTool5Desc: Process your entire catalog at once
bgRemoverPage.faqQ1: What is the best tool for removing backgrounds from product photos?
bgRemoverPage.faqA1: Luminify uses the ISNet neural network, specifically trained on product photography. It precisely isolates objects even on complex backgrounds — jewelry, fine details, semi-transparent elements.
bgRemoverPage.faqQ2: How does AI background removal work?
bgRemoverPage.faqA2: The neural network analyzes the image, detects the main object, and creates a mask. Then the background is replaced with a transparent layer. All processing happens locally in your browser — photos are never uploaded anywhere.
bgRemoverPage.faqQ3: Is there any quality loss when removing the background?
bgRemoverPage.faqA3: No. The tool works with the original image resolution. Results are saved in lossless PNG format.
bgRemoverPage.faqQ4: Is it free? Do I need to sign up?
bgRemoverPage.faqA4: Background removal is completely free and requires no registration. Everything works right in your browser — no server uploads.
bgRemoverPage.faqQ5: Can I replace the background after removing it?
bgRemoverPage.faqA5: Yes! In Luminify's full editor, you can choose a background color, gradient, photo, or keep it transparent. Aspect ratio and product size settings are also available.
bgRemoverPage.ctaTitle: Ready to speed up your content creation?
bgRemoverPage.ctaSubtitle: Try all Luminify tools — background removal, lifestyle photos, product cards, and more.

whiteBgPage.metaTitle: White Background for Photos — Free AI Tool | Luminify
whiteBgPage.metaDescription: Add a white background to your product photo in seconds — right in your browser. Perfect for marketplaces and catalogs.
whiteBgPage.heroTitle: Add a white background to your product photo
whiteBgPage.heroSubtitle: AI automatically removes the background and replaces it with white or any other color. Perfect for marketplaces and catalogs.
whiteBgPage.noImage: No image? Try one of these
whiteBgPage.block1Title: A clean backdrop for every product photo
whiteBgPage.block1Desc: A white background removes distractions and puts the focus on your product. Buyers see only your item — no clutter, no noise.
whiteBgPage.block2Desc: No photographer, lighting, or white backdrop needed. Take a photo on your phone — AI does the rest. Results look studio-quality.
whiteBgPage.block3Desc: Amazon, eBay, Shopify — all major platforms require white backgrounds for product photos. With Luminify, bring your catalog into compliance in minutes.
whiteBgPage.block4Title: White as a base for further editing
whiteBgPage.block4Desc: Use your white-background photo as a base: add shadows, change the background color, or create a product card in Luminify's editor.
whiteBgPage.howToTitle: How to add a white background to product photos
whiteBgPage.step1Desc: Choose a photo in any format — JPG, PNG, WEBP. Even a phone photo with any background will work.
whiteBgPage.step2Title: AI replaces the background with white
whiteBgPage.step2Desc: The neural network automatically isolates your product and replaces the background with clean white. You can also choose any other color.
whiteBgPage.step3Desc: Download the result in PNG format. Ready to upload to marketplaces, catalogs, or social media.
whiteBgPage.faqQ1: How do I add a white background to a product photo?
whiteBgPage.faqA1: Upload your photo to Luminify's tool — AI automatically removes the background and replaces it with white. The entire process takes seconds and works right in your browser.
whiteBgPage.faqQ2: What is the best tool for adding a white background?
whiteBgPage.faqA2: Luminify uses the ISNet neural network trained on product photography. It precisely isolates objects and creates a clean white background — even for fine details like jewelry.
whiteBgPage.faqQ3: Is a white background required for marketplace photos?
whiteBgPage.faqA3: Yes, most major marketplaces — Amazon, eBay, Shopify — require a white or light background for main product photos. This increases conversions and meets platform standards.
whiteBgPage.faqQ4: Will my product look flat on a white background?
whiteBgPage.faqA4: No. AI precisely preserves contours and product details. For extra depth, you can add shadows in Luminify's editor.
whiteBgPage.faqA5: Yes, adding a white background is completely free and requires no registration. Processing happens right in your browser — photos are never uploaded anywhere.

blurBgPage.metaTitle: Blur Background — Free AI Tool | Luminify
blurBgPage.metaDescription: Blur the background of your photo in seconds — AI detects the subject and creates a beautiful bokeh effect. Free, right in your browser.
blurBgPage.heroSubtitle: AI automatically detects the subject in your photo and blurs the background — like a professional portrait lens. Adjust blur intensity with a slider.
blurBgPage.noImage: No image? Try one of these
blurBgPage.block1Desc: AI precisely detects object boundaries and blurs only the background. Your product stays sharp while distracting details softly disappear — like shooting with a professional lens.
blurBgPage.block2Desc: Took a product photo in your kitchen or store? Background blur hides the clutter and makes the photo clean and attractive — no reshooting needed.
blurBgPage.block3Title: Professional photos without an expensive camera
blurBgPage.block3Desc: The bokeh effect usually requires a fast lens costing hundreds of dollars. With Luminify, you get the same result from a regular smartphone photo — for free.
blurBgPage.block4Desc: After blurring the background, you can add text, shadows, or move the product to a new background in Luminify's editor. Create a product card in just a few clicks.
blurBgPage.howToTitle: How to blur a photo background
blurBgPage.step1Desc: Choose a product photo in JPG, PNG, or WEBP format. Even a phone photo with any background will work.
blurBgPage.step2Desc: The neural network detects the subject, separates it from the background, and applies blur. Adjust the intensity with a slider — from light to strong.
blurBgPage.step3Desc: Download the finished photo in PNG format. Use it for Instagram, marketplaces, or your website.
blurBgPage.faqQ1: How do I blur the background of a photo?
blurBgPage.faqA1: Upload your photo to Luminify's tool — AI automatically detects the subject and blurs the background. You can adjust blur intensity with a slider from 1 to 25 pixels. Everything works right in your browser in seconds.
blurBgPage.faqQ2: Do I need Photoshop to blur a background?
blurBgPage.faqA2: No. Luminify does everything automatically — no need to manually select objects or know graphic design software. Just upload a photo and choose the blur intensity.
blurBgPage.faqQ3: Do I need an expensive camera for the bokeh effect?
blurBgPage.faqA3: No. AI creates a realistic blurred background effect from any photo, including smartphone shots. The result looks like it was taken with a professional portrait lens.

toolsPage.metaDescription: Free AI tools for product photography: background removal, color replacement, blur, AI generation, and product card creation.
toolsPage.heroSubtitle: Create studio-quality product photos in seconds with AI. All tools work right in your browser.
toolsPage.catBgDesc: Remove, replace, and edit backgrounds on product photos — automatically and for free.
toolsPage.toolRemoveBgDesc: AI precisely detects the subject and removes the background in seconds. Get a transparent PNG.
toolsPage.toolWhiteBgDesc: Place your product on a clean white or any solid-color background — perfect for marketplaces.
toolsPage.toolBlurBgDesc: Create a bokeh effect — blur the background while keeping the product in focus. Adjust blur intensity.
toolsPage.toolChangeBgDesc: Replace the background with any color, gradient, or make it transparent. 12 presets + custom HEX.
toolsPage.toolAddBgDesc: Replace the background with an image from the gallery or upload your own. AI removes the old background and adds the new one.
toolsPage.catAiDesc: Create professional product photos and cards with the power of artificial intelligence.
toolsPage.toolGenerateDesc: Upload your product and get a studio photo in any setting — AI generates a realistic scene.
toolsPage.toolCardsDesc: Create a ready-made product card for Amazon, eBay, or Instagram in just a few clicks.

addBgPage.metaTitle: Add Background to Photo — Free AI Tool | Luminify
addBgPage.metaDescription: Add a new background to your photo in seconds — choose from the gallery or upload your own. AI precisely separates the subject. Free, in your browser.
addBgPage.heroTitle: Add a new background to your photo
addBgPage.heroSubtitle: AI automatically removes the old background and replaces it with your chosen image. Pick from preset backgrounds or upload your own.
addBgPage.noImage: No image? Try one of these
addBgPage.block1Desc: The right background adds context, depth, and emotion. A marble surface, wooden table, or soft gradient — each background changes how the product is perceived and makes the photo more appealing.
addBgPage.block2Desc: A clean, thoughtful background helps the product take center stage. Buyers immediately focus on the product, not distracting details around it.
addBgPage.block3Desc: No need to learn Photoshop or hire a designer. Upload a photo, choose a background — and AI does the rest. The result looks like a professional studio shoot.
addBgPage.block4Title: Upload any image as a background
addBgPage.block4Desc: Beyond preset options, you can upload your own image as a background. An interior photo, fabric texture, or brand backdrop — it's your choice.
addBgPage.howToTitle: How to add a background to a photo
addBgPage.step1Desc: Choose a photo in JPG, PNG, or WEBP format. AI automatically removes the current background and prepares the subject.
addBgPage.step2Desc: Pick a color, gallery background, or upload your own image. Try different options — the result updates instantly.
addBgPage.step3Desc: Download the finished photo in PNG format. Use it for your catalog, social media, or marketplace.
addBgPage.faqQ1: How do I add a new background to a photo?
addBgPage.faqA1: Upload your photo to Luminify's tool — AI automatically removes the current background. Then choose a new one: a solid color, gallery background, or upload your own image. Everything works in your browser.
addBgPage.faqQ2: Can I upload my own image as a background?
addBgPage.faqA2: Yes. Click 'Upload an image' in the Custom background section and select any file. The background automatically scales to fit your photo.
addBgPage.faqQ3: Do I need Photoshop to replace the background?
addBgPage.faqA3: No. Luminify does everything automatically — AI isolates the subject and places it on the new background. No graphic design skills required.
addBgPage.faqA4: JPG, PNG, and WEBP are supported for both the product photo and background image. The result is always saved as PNG.
addBgPage.faqQ5: What tasks is this tool good for?
addBgPage.faqA5: Product photos for marketplaces, social media posts, online store catalogs, and any task where you need to quickly change the background without a studio or photographer.

changeBgPage.metaTitle: Change Background Color — Free AI Tool | Luminify
changeBgPage.metaDescription: Replace the background of your photo in seconds — choose a color, gradient, or custom shade. AI precisely separates the subject. Free, right in your browser.
changeBgPage.heroSubtitle: AI automatically detects the subject and replaces the background with your chosen color or gradient. Perfect for catalogs, marketplaces, and social media.
changeBgPage.noImage: No image? Try one of these
changeBgPage.transparentHint: The background will be completely removed. Download a PNG with transparency or send the photo to create a product card or AI-generated image.
changeBgPage.block1Desc: Pick from 12 preset colors or enter your own HEX code. AI precisely separates the subject and replaces the background — no manual selection or Photoshop required.
changeBgPage.block2Desc: Smooth color transitions give product photos a premium, modern look. Choose from 8 ready-made gradients — from soft pastels to bold contrasts.
changeBgPage.block3Desc: All product photos on the same background — your catalog looks professional and polished. Use your brand color for instant recognition.
changeBgPage.block4Desc: Marketplaces require white or solid backgrounds? Prepare your photos in a couple of clicks — no studio or photographer needed.
changeBgPage.howToTitle: How to change photo background color
changeBgPage.step1Desc: Choose a product photo in JPG, PNG, or WEBP format. Any shot will work — even from a phone.
changeBgPage.step2Desc: Select a background color from the palette, enter a HEX code, or choose a ready-made gradient. AI instantly replaces the background.
changeBgPage.step3Desc: Download the finished photo in PNG format with its new background. Use it for your catalog, social media, or marketplace.
changeBgPage.faqQ1: How do I change the background color of a photo?
changeBgPage.faqA1: Upload your photo to Luminify's tool, pick a color or gradient from the palette — AI automatically detects the subject and replaces the background. Everything works in your browser in seconds.
changeBgPage.faqQ2: Can I use a custom background color?
changeBgPage.faqA2: Yes. In addition to 12 preset colors and 8 gradients, you can enter any HEX code or pick a color from the color picker. This is great for using your brand colors.
changeBgPage.faqQ3: Do I need Photoshop to replace the background?
changeBgPage.faqA3: No. Luminify does everything automatically — AI isolates the subject and replaces the background for you. No graphic design skills required.
changeBgPage.faqA4: JPG, PNG, and WEBP formats are supported. The result is always saved as a high-quality PNG so the background looks perfect.
changeBgPage.faqQ5: Is this suitable for marketplace product photos?
changeBgPage.faqA5: Yes. The tool is perfect for preparing photos for Amazon, eBay, Etsy, and other platforms that require solid or white backgrounds.
